siteId.label: Site ID
siteId.description: Customer.io site ID. This can be found on your [API Credentials page](https://fly.customer.io/settings/api_credentials).

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Customer.io API key. This can be found on your [API Credentials page](https://fly.customer.io/settings/api_credentials).

createUpdateDevice.title: Create or Update Device
createUpdateDevice.description: Create or update a person's device.
createUpdateDevice.defaultSubscription: event = "Application Installed" or event = "Application Opened" or event = "Device Created or Updated"

person_id.label: Person ID
person_id.description: The ID of the person that this mobile device belongs to.

device_id.label: Device ID
device_id.description: The device token of a customer's mobile device.

last_used.label: Last Used
last_used.description: The timestamp for when the mobile device was last used. Default is current date and time.

attributes.label: Event Attributes
attributes.description: Optional data that you can reference to segment your audience, like a person's attributes, but specific to a device.

convert_timestamp.label: Convert Timestamps
convert_timestamp.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

person_id.description: The ID of the person that this mobile device belongs to.

device_id.label: Device ID
device_id.description: The device token of a customer's mobile device.

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

deleteRelationship.title: Delete Relationship
deleteRelationship.description: Delete a relationship between a person and an object in Customer.io.

person_id.label: Person ID
person_id.description: The ID of the person that this mobile device belongs to.

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: An optional anonymous ID. This is used to tie anonymous events to this person. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/anonymous-events/).

object_id.label: Object ID
object_id.description: An object ID used to identify an object.

object_type_id.label: Object Type ID
object_type_id.description: An object ID type used to identify the type of object.

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

person_id.description: The ID of the person that this mobile device belongs to.

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

object_id.label: Object ID
object_id.description: An object ID used to identify an object.

object_type_id.label: Object Type ID
object_type_id.description: An object ID type used to identify the type of object.

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

createUpdatePerson.title: Create or Update Person
createUpdatePerson.description: Create a person in Customer.io or update them if they exist.

id.label: Person ID
id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify a person in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/identifying-people/#identifiers).

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: An optional anonymous ID. This is used to tie anonymous events to this person. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/anonymous-events/).

created_at.label: Created At
created_at.description: A timestamp of when the person was created.

group_id.label: Object ID
group_id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify an object in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/object-relationships).

custom_attributes.label: Person Attributes
custom_attributes.description: Optional attributes for the person. When updating a person, attributes are added or updated, not removed.

relationship_attributes.label: Relationship Attributes
relationship_attributes.description: Optional attributes for the relationship between the object and the user. When updating an object, attributes are added or updated, not removed.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the person was identified. Default is current date and time. Used for ordering updates to the person.

convert_timestamp.label: Convert Timestamps
convert_timestamp.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

object_type_id.label: Object Type Id
object_type_id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify a custom object type in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/object-relationships).

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

trackEvent.title: Track Event
trackEvent.description: Track an event for a known or anonymous person.
trackEvent.defaultSubscription:
type = "track"
    and event != "Application Installed"
    and event != "Application Opened"
    and event != "Application Uninstalled"
    and event != "Device Created or Updated"
    and event != "Device Deleted"
    and event != "Relationship Deleted"
    and event != "User Deleted"
    and event != "User Suppressed"
    and event != "User Unsuppressed"
    and event != "Object Deleted"
    and event != "Report Delivery Event"
    and event != "Report Content Event"

id.label: Person ID
id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify a person in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/identifying-people/#identifiers).

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: An anonymous ID for when no Person ID exists. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/anonymous-events/).

event_id.label: Event ID
event_id.description: An optional identifier used to deduplicate events. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/api/#operation/track).

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the event took place. Default is current date and time.

data.label: Event Attributes
data.description: Optional data to include with the event.

convert_timestamp.label: Convert Timestamps
convert_timestamp.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

trackPageView.description: Track a page view for a known or anonymous person.

event_id.label: Event ID
event_id.description: An optional identifier used to deduplicate events. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/api/#operation/track).

url.label: Page URL
url.description: The URL of the page visited.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the event took place. Default is current date and time.

data.label: Event Attributes
data.description: Optional data to include with the event.

convert_timestamp.label: Convert Timestamps
convert_timestamp.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

trackScreenView.title: Track Screen View
trackScreenView.description: Track a screen view for a known or anonymous person.

id.label: Person ID
id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify a person in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/identifying-people/#identifiers).

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: An anonymous ID for when no Person ID exists. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/anonymous-events/).

event_id.label: Event ID
event_id.description: An optional identifier used to deduplicate events. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/api/#operation/track).

name.label: Screen name
name.description: The name of the screen visited.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the event took place. Default is current date and time.

data.label: Event Attributes
data.description: Optional data to include with the event.

convert_timestamp.label: Convert Timestamps
convert_timestamp.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

createUpdateObject.title: Create or Update Object
createUpdateObject.description: Create an object in Customer.io or update them if they exist.

id.label: Object ID
id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify an object in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/object-relationships).

created_at.label: Created At
created_at.description: A timestamp of when the object was created.

custom_attributes.label: Object Attributes
custom_attributes.description: Optional attributes for the object. When updating an object, attributes are added or updated, not removed.

relationship_attributes.label: Relationship Attributes
relationship_attributes.description: Optional attributes for the relationship between the object and the user. When updating an relationship, attributes are added or updated, not removed.

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: The ID used to relate a user to an object in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/identifying-people/#identifiers).

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: An anonymous ID to relate to an object when no Person ID exists. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/anonymous-events/).

object_type_id.label: Object Type Id
object_type_id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify a custom object type in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/object-relationships).

convert_timestamp.label: Convert Timestamps
convert_timestamp.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

primary.label: Primary User
primary.description: The person that you want to remain after the merge, identified by id, email or cio_id. This person receives information from the secondary person in the merge.

secondary.label: Secondary User
secondary.description: The person that you want to delete after the merge, identified by id, email or cio_id. This person's information is merged into the primary person's profile and then it is deleted.

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

suppressPerson.title: Suppress Person
suppressPerson.description: Suppress a person in Customer.io. This will prevent the person from receiving any messages.

person_id.label: Person ID
person_id.description: The ID of the person that this mobile device belongs to.

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

unsuppressPerson.title: Unsuppress Person
unsuppressPerson.description: Unsuppress a person in Customer.io. This will allow the person to receive messages again.

person_id.label: Person ID
person_id.description: The ID of the person that this mobile device belongs to.

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

reportDeliveryEvent.title: Report Delivery Event
reportDeliveryEvent.description: Report delivery metrics for a message sent from the Customer.io Journeys product.

delivery_id.label: Delivery ID
delivery_id.description: The CIO-Delivery-ID from the message that you want to associate the metric with.

metric.label: Metric
metric.description: The metric you want to report back to Customer.io. Not all metrics are available for all channels. Please refer to the [documentation](https://customer.io/docs/api/track/#operation/metrics) for more information.

recipient.label: Recipient
recipient.description: Information about who the message was delivered to. For email, SMS and mobile push this is the email address, phone number and device token, respectively.

reason.label: Reason
reason.description: For metrics indicating a failure, this field provides information for the failure.

href.label: Href
href.description: For click metrics, this is the link that was clicked.

action_name.label: Action Name
action_name.description: For In-App messages, this is the name of the action that was clicked.

action_value.label: Action Value
action_value.description: For In-App messages, this is the value of the action that was clicked.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the metric event took place. Default is when the event was triggered.

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

reportContentEvent.title: Report Content Event
reportContentEvent.description: Report a Viewed or Clicked Content event.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the event took place. Default is current date and time.

data.label: Event Attributes
data.description: Optional data to include with the event.

convert_timestamp.label: Convert Timestamps
convert_timestamp.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

presets.name: Create or Update Device
presets.subscribe:
event = "Application Installed"
        or event = "Application Opened"
        or event = "Device Created or Updated"

presets.name: Track Event
presets.subscribe:
type = "track"
        and event != "Application Installed"
        and event != "Application Opened"
        and event != "Application Uninstalled"
        and event != "Device Created or Updated"
        and event != "Device Deleted"
        and event != "Relationship Deleted"
        and event != "User Deleted"
        and event != "User Suppressed"
        and event != "User Unsuppressed"
        and event != "Object Deleted"
        and event != "Report Delivery Event"
        and event != "Report Content Event"
